title: Calcium 2-ethylhexanoate and 2-ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate - Canada.ca
content:
## Calcium 2-ethylhexanoate and 2-ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate
- Calcium 2-ethylhexanoate and 2-ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
- Follow-up activities
Final order and RIAS
Final screening assessment
Proposed risk management approach
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Calcium 2-ethylhexanoate
Hexanoic acid, 2-ethyl-, calcium salt
Significant New Activity (SNAc) provisions
2-Ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate
Hexanoic acid, 2-ethyl-, 2-ethylhexyl ester
Meets one or more of the criteria
Refer to proposed risk management approach
Publication in the Canada Gazette , Part II: Vol. 160, No. 6 of an order adding 2-ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate to Part 2 of Schedule 1 to the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA).
Publication in the Canada Gazette , Part II: Vol. 160, No. 6 of an order adding 2-ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate to Part 2 of Schedule 1 to the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA).
Publication in Canada Gazette , Part II, Vol. 160, No. 4 of an order amending the Domestic Substances List (DSL) to apply the SNAc provisions of the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA) to 2-ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate.
Publication in Canada Gazette , Part II, Vol. 160, No. 4 of an order amending the Domestic Substances List (DSL) to apply the SNAc provisions of the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA) to 2-ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate.
Publication in the Canada Gazette , Part II: Vol. 156, No. 17 of an order amending the DSL to apply the SNAc provisions of CEPA to calcium 2-ethylhexanoate.
Publication in the Canada Gazette , Part II: Vol. 156, No. 17 of an order amending the DSL to apply the SNAc provisions of CEPA to calcium 2-ethylhexanoate.
Publication in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 154, No. 37 of a notice of intent to amend the DSL to apply the SNAc provisions of CEPA to 2-ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate and start of 60-day public comment period.
Publication in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 153, No. 9 of a proposed order adding 2-ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate to Schedule 1 to CEPA and start of 60-day public comment period.
Publication of the Final Screening Assessment for Calcium 2-Ethylhexanoate and 2-Ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate . The Risk Management Approach for 2-Ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate was also published for a 60-day public comment period. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 152, No. 50 .
Publication in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 152, No. 50 of a notice of intent to amend the DSL to apply the SNAc provisions of CEPA to calcium 2-ethylhexanoate and start of 60-day public comment period.
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the Draft Screening Assessment for Calcium 2-Ethylhexanoate and 2-Ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate (including follow-up activities for calcium 2-ethylhexanoate) and the Risk Management Scope for 2-Ethylhexyl 2-ethylhexanoate . The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 151, No. 12 .

## Follow-up activities
While calcium 2-ethylhexanoate is not considered to be harmful to human health at levels of exposure considered in the assessment, it is considered to have a health effect of concern due to its potential developmental toxicity. Therefore, there may be a potential concern if exposures were to increase. As such, the SNAc provisions of CEPA have been applied to calcium 2-ethylhexanoate.
